hyperedges.label: Login Flow: routes + auth helpers + crud + audit
Async DB Stack: Base + engine + session + get_db

hyperedges.description: All routes use services.common.envelope.ok wrapping for standard {success,message,data,error} response
Per-service enums.py re-export TINYINT label maps from common.enums plus _REVERSE companions (Arch-29)
All CRUD classes use static async methods on AsyncSession with soft-delete filter and standard get/list/create shape
